name: Blueberry Muffins with Nutmeg Topping
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Unsalted butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, cream butter with both sugars until very light in color.
2. Scrape sides of the bowl with a rubber spatula.
3. Add vanilla, eggs, and buttermilk; beat constantly.
4. In another bowl, stir together nutmeg, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and flours.
5. Add dry ingredients to butter mixture.
6. Mix just until combined.
7. Gently fold in blueberries.
8. Fill paper-lined muffin cups about 2/3 full with batter.
9. Sprinkle each muffin with about 2 teaspoons of nutmeg sugar.
10. Bake on the rack in the upper 1/3 of a 400-degree (200°C) oven until muffins are lightly browned, about 20 to 25 minutes.
11. Remove muffins from pan to a cooling rack. Serve warm or at room temperature. Makes 16 muffins or 6 jumbo muffins.
